description: Cyber threat insights with CrowdSec, Loki and Grafana

targets.expr: sum by (instance, country, asname, asnumber, iprange, ip, type) (count_over_time({job="crowdsec", instance=~"${host:raw}"} | country != "" | keep instance, country, asname, asnumber, iprange, ip, type [$__range]))
topk(10, sum by (country) (count_over_time({job="crowdsec", instance=~"${host:raw}"} | country != "" | keep country [$__range])))
sum by (country, longitude, latitude) (count_over_time({job="crowdsec", instance=~"${host:raw}"} | country != "" | keep country, longitude, latitude [$__range]))

title: Crowdsec Live Threat Insights
